title: 美国要给加拿大100%关税特朗普: 卡尼，不叫我爸爸的代价你一会就懂了
text: 美国要给加拿大100%关税特朗普: 卡尼，不叫我爸爸的代价你一会就懂了https://x.com/kobeissiletter/status/2015066539335074118?s=46
content:
美国要给加拿大100%关税
特朗普: 卡尼，不叫我爸爸的代价你一会就懂了https://x.com/kobeissiletter/status/2015066539335074118?s=46
X (formerly Twitter)
The Kobeissi Letter (@KobeissiLetter) on X
BREAKING: President Trump says he will impose a 100% tariff on ALL Canadian goods and products if Canada makes a trade deal with China.

Just 8 days ago, Canada announced a new "strategic partnership" with China.

We are back to step #1 of the tariff playbook.
